- **Axial vs. Sagittal:** Axial images are horizontal cross-sections (looking up from the feet), while sagittal images are side-view slices (dividing left/right)
- **T1WI vs. T2WI:** On T1-weighted images, fluid (like CSF) appears dark; on T2-weighted images, fluid appears bright
